title: Octo WAF Detections vs App 5xx
description: Joins OCI WAF detection events with Shop/CRM 5xx responses using the shared X-Request-Id header. Used to build the Security Posture dashboard and to feed the waf-tighten-suggest playbook.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC WAF Security Logs') and ('WAF Action' != null or 'HTTP Status Code' >= 500) | stats count as events, countif('WAF Action' != null) as waf, countif('HTTP Status Code' >= 500) as app5xx by 'Client IP', 'URL Path' | where waf > 0 and app5xx > 0 | sort -events
notes: Non-zero output is strong evidence of probing that bypassed or stressed the WAF.
